1 The data in this column identifies the patient's use of a Orthotics/Prosthetics prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury. 0 = No
1 = Yes
302 GG0110Z_PRIOR_NONE_OF_THE_ABV GG0110Z_PRIOR_NONE_OF_THE_ABV GG0110Z Prior Device Use - None of Above Code - The data in this column indicates whether or not the patient used any mobility devices prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether or not the patient used any mobility devices
